top_signals.title: China added Nvidia’s gaming chip to banned list during Jensen Huang’s visit
top_signals.summary: Beijing aims to support domestic players including Huawei and Cambricon as they catch up to US rivals
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Putin and Xi Seek Deepened Alliance
top_signals.summary:
Russian President Vladimir Putin is holding high-stakes talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, seeking to secure a critical, long-stalled energy pipeline agreement.

 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Inflation and interest rates tracker: see how your country compares
top_signals.summary: Inflationary pressures are beginning to wane. Explore the latest data through interactive charts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Global Banks Fill Void in Australian AT1 Debt After Phaseout
top_signals.summary: The decision by Australia’s banking watchdog to phase out Additional Tier 1 bonds marked the end of local lenders issuing the riskiest type of bank debt. Big international banks are now moving in to fill the void.
